governing_law.value: Laws of the State of Nevada
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be interpreted under the laws of the State of Nevada.

non_compete.value: SC&W agrees not to serve in a strategic marketing capacity for another insurer in Nevada while it is providing such services for MICOA or for a period of one year thereafter.
non_compete.exact_text: SC&W agrees not to serve in a strategic marketing capacity for another insurer in Nevada while it is providing such services for MICOA or for a period of one year thereafter.

fields.payment_terms: within 30 business days of the month in which such premiums are received and recorded by MICOA
fields.notice_period: at least one hundred twenty (120) days
